summary: Analysis of TileEffect handler classes used in the tactical combat system for applying skills, status effects, and clearing effects from tiles.

handlers.name: ApplySkillTileEffectHandler
handlers.description: Applies a skill effect to entities based on configurable trigger conditions (entry, turn start/end, round start, movement).

handler_fields.name: OwningTile
handler_fields.description: Reference to the tile this effect is attached to (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

handler_fields.name: SpawnedPrefab
handler_fields.description: Visual prefab instance for the effect (inherited)

handler_fields.name: LifetimeCounter
handler_fields.description: Number of rounds elapsed since effect was created (inherited)

handler_fields.name: SkillInstance
handler_fields.description: Instantiated skill object created from SkillTemplate

template_fields.name: HasLifetime
template_fields.description: Whether effect expires after a duration

flag_values.0x01: OnAdd - Trigger when effect is first added to tile
flag_values.0x02: OnTurnStart - Trigger at start of entity's turn
flag_values.0x04: OnTurnEnd - Trigger at end of entity's turn
flag_values.0x08: OnRoundStart - Trigger at start of each round
flag_values.0x20: OnEnter - Trigger when entity enters tile
flag_values.0x40: OnLeave - Trigger when entity leaves tile
flag_values.0x80: OnMovementFinished - Trigger when entity finishes moving

template_fields.name: SkillTemplate
template_fields.description: Template used to create the skill instance

template_fields.name: Sound
template_fields.description: Sound effect played when skill triggers

template_fields.name: RemoveOnTrigger
template_fields.description: If true, effect is removed after skill application

template_fields.name: Condition
template_fields.description: Optional condition that must pass before skill applies

key_methods.name: ApplySkill
key_methods.description: Core method that checks condition, plays sound, uses skill with flags=0x13, and optionally removes effect

key_methods.name: IsValidTarget
key_methods.description: Evaluates the Condition field against target entity

key_methods.name: ForceTrigger
key_methods.description: Bypasses conditions and forces skill application

key_methods.name: OnRoundStart
key_methods.description: Checks flag 0x08, calls ApplySkill with null entity

handlers.name: ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler
handlers.description: Applies a status effect skill to entities entering the tile, with optional tag-based filtering and removal on leave.

handler_fields.name: OwningTile
handler_fields.description: Reference to the tile this effect is attached to (inherited)

handler_fields.name: SpawnedPrefab
handler_fields.description: Visual prefab instance for the effect (inherited)

template_fields.name: HasLifetime
template_fields.description: Whether effect expires after a duration

template_fields.name: StatusEffectTemplate
template_fields.description: Skill template for the status effect to apply

template_fields.name: RequiredTags
template_fields.description: Entity must have at least one of these tags to receive effect

template_fields.name: ExcludedTags
template_fields.description: Entity must NOT have any of these tags to receive effect

template_fields.name: RemoveOnLeave
template_fields.description: If true, status effect is removed when entity leaves tile

key_methods.name: OnEnter
key_methods.description: Validates tags, creates skill from template, adds to entity's SkillContainer

key_methods.name: OnLeave
key_methods.description: If RemoveOnLeave=true, removes skill by template ID from entity's SkillContainer

key_methods.name: AppendTooltipData
key_methods.description: Adds Name, Description, and StatusEffectTemplate description to tooltip

handlers.name: ClearTileEffectHandler
handlers.description: Skill effect handler that removes tile effects from an area with distance-based probability falloff.

handler_fields.name: Skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the skill using this effect

effect_fields.name: EffectToClear
effect_fields.description: Type of tile effect to remove

effect_fields.name: ChanceAtCenter
effect_fields.description: Base percentage chance (0-100) at target tile

effect_fields.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
effect_fields.description: Percentage reduction per tile of distance from center

key_methods.name: OnApply
key_methods.description: Iterates tiles in AoE, rolls distance-adjusted probability, calls Tile.RemoveAllEffectsOfType

handlers.algorithm: For each tile: chance = ChanceAtCenter - (distance * ChancePerTileFromCenter). Random roll <= chance triggers removal.

handlers.name: ClearTileEffectGroupHandler
handlers.description: Skill effect handler that removes multiple types of tile effects at once from a hit tile.

handler_fields.name: Skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the skill using this effect

handler_fields.name: Effect
handler_fields.description: Configuration for the group clear effect

effect_fields.name: EffectGroup
effect_fields.description: Collection of TileEffectTemplate references to clear

effect_fields.name: RemoveAll
effect_fields.description: If true, removes ALL instances of each effect type; if false, removes one per type

key_methods.name: OnTileHit
key_methods.description: Iterates TileEffectGroup, calls Tile.RemoveAllEffectsOfType for each template

base_class_info.name: TileEffectHandler
base_class_info.description: Abstract base class for all tile effect handlers

common_fields.name: OwningTile
common_fields.description: The tile this effect is attached to

common_fields.name: LifetimeCounter
common_fields.description: Tracks rounds elapsed for lifetime expiration

key_methods.name: StartRound
key_methods.description: Increments LifetimeCounter, checks MaxLifetime, calls OnRoundStart or removes effect

key_methods.name: Refresh
key_methods.description: Resets LifetimeCounter to 0 and calls OnAdded virtual

key_methods.name: GetLifetimeLeft
key_methods.description: Returns MaxLifetime - LifetimeCounter, or INT_MAX if no lifetime

key_methods.name: AppendTooltipData
key_methods.description: Adds Name (0x78) and Description (0x80) from template to tooltip

key_discoveries.details: ApplySkillTileEffectHandler uses a byte bitmask at template+0xB8 to configure when skills trigger. Multiple flags can be combined for effects that trigger on multiple events.
ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler supports tag-based entity filtering via RequiredTags (0xC0) and ExcludedTags (0xC8) lists, enabling selective application to specific entity types.
ClearTileEffectHandler implements falloff mechanics where removal chance decreases linearly with distance from center: chance = ChanceAtCenter - (distance * ChancePerTileFromCenter).
ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler supports aura mechanics via RemoveOnLeave flag (0xD0), which automatically removes the status when entities exit the tile.
ApplySkillTileEffectHandler supports optional ITacticalCondition validation at template+0xD8, allowing complex trigger requirements beyond simple event flags.
Skills applied via tile effects use flags=0x13 (ForceApply|FromTileEffect) in Skill.Use calls, bypassing normal targeting/cost requirements.
All handlers inherit lifetime tracking from TileEffectHandler: HasLifetime (0x8C) and MaxLifetime (0x90) in template, LifetimeCounter (0x1C) in handler.
ClearTileEffectGroupHandler can clear multiple effect types at once by iterating through a TileEffectGroup collection, with optional RemoveAll flag for complete or partial clearing.

related_types: Menace.Tactical.Tile - Contains effect list and RemoveEffect/RemoveAllEffectsOfType methods
Menace.Tactical.Skills.Skill - Applied by ApplySkillTileEffectHandler via Use method
Menace.Tactical.Skills.SkillContainer - Manages status effects on entities
Menace.Tactical.Skills.ITacticalCondition - Interface for conditional skill application
Menace.Tools.PseudoRandom - Used for probability rolls in ClearTileEffectHandler
Stem.ID - Audio system for playing trigger sounds
